summary: Desktop homepage micro-polish verification - ALL 8 POINTS PASSED. Verified: (1) H1 max-width 980px, font 56px/800, letter-spacing -0.02em, two controlled line breaks with display:block spans, (2) Intro cards with horizontal icon+title row, accent bar 72x4px rgba(192,54,44,0.18), right stacked cards gap 16px, trust chips bg #FAFCFE, (3) CTA pill container with bg #FAFCFE, border #D9E6F2, Book button 220x54 bg #C0362C, Call button 220x54 border 2px #C0362C, (4) How It Works 96px icon circles, title 18px/800, body 14px/1.6, section paddingBottom 80px, (5) All 3 pricing icons #C0362C with #E5F0FA bg, inter-card gap 24px, review buttons height 44px, review card padding 24px, (6) FAQ left accent bar 4px #C0362C (not full red border), neutral 1px #D9E6F2 border on closed, question 16px/800, answer 14px/1.7, (7) Nav underline bug fix - only one aria-expanded=true at a time when switching dropdowns, (8) Footer phone 18px/800, Hours label 15px/800, trust card padding 32px, Book button 52px, external buttons 44px, Privacy Policy once. Mobile 375px view unchanged.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 8 desktop micro-polish points verified, mobile view unchanged)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 desktop micro-polish points implemented correctly. H1 has controlled 2-line break with display:block spans. Intro cards have horizontal icon+title layout with accent bar. CTA row in pill container. How It Works cards with 96px icons. Pricing icons all #C0362C. FAQ uses left accent bar only (not full red border) on open. Nav dropdown mutual exclusivity working. Footer readability improved with larger phone, Hours label, 32px trust card padding.
